codeReview.summary: Fix commit d8490fc adequately addresses the blocking issue. FeatureLeadManager is now properly integrated with Orchestrator state, with leads registered on spawn and observable through public APIs.

summary: Reviewed fix for orch-feature-leads. The fix (commit d8490fc) properly addresses the prior blocking issue where spawned FeatureLeads were only stored in ExecutionController's local map and not surfaced through Orchestrator state. Changes include: (1) Added feature_lead_manager field to Orchestrator struct with proper initialization in both constructors, (2) Wired spawn_feature_lead to register leads with the manager, (3) Fixed get_active_feature_leads and has_feature_lead to query the manager instead of returning empty/false, (4) Added public async APIs get_active_feature_leads, has_feature_lead, get_feature_lead, remove_feature_lead for external observability, (5) Fixed ExecutionController cleanup to remove from both orchestrator manager and local cache, (6) Fixed parent_orch reference to use self.orchestrator.clone() instead of creating a new orphaned Orchestrator instance. All changes are consistent with the feature's expected behavior of surfacing sub-orchestrators through Orchestrator state.
